lines.english: Why is Tim finding this trip exciting?
lines.chinese: 蒂姆为什么觉得这次旅行令人兴奋？
lines.raw: Why is Tim finding this trip exciting? | 蒂姆为什么觉得这次旅行令人兴奋？

lines.english: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim.
lines.chinese: 我刚收到我哥哥蒂姆的一封信。
lines.raw: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim. | 我刚收到我哥哥蒂姆的一封信。
He is in Australia. | 他在澳大利亚。

lines.english: He has been there for six months.
lines.chinese: 他在那里已经六个月了。
lines.raw: He has been there for six months. | 他在那里已经六个月了。
Tim is an engineer. | 蒂姆是一名工程师。

lines.english: He is working for a big firm and he has already visited
lines.chinese: 他在一家大公司工作，并且他已经参观了
lines.raw: He is working for a big firm and he has already visited | 他在一家大公司工作，并且他已经参观了

lines.english: a great number of different places in Australia.
lines.chinese: 澳大利亚的许多不同地方。
lines.raw: a great number of different places in Australia. | 澳大利亚的许多不同地方。

lines.english: He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs,
lines.chinese: 他刚买了一辆澳大利亚汽车，然后去了爱丽丝泉，
lines.raw: He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs, | 他刚买了一辆澳大利亚汽车，然后去了爱丽丝泉，

lines.english: a small town in the centre of Australia.
lines.chinese: 一个位于澳大利亚中部的小镇。
lines.raw: a small town in the centre of Australia. | 一个位于澳大利亚中部的小镇。
He will soon visit Darwin. | 他很快将参观达尔文。

lines.english: From there, he will fly to Perth.
lines.raw: From there, he will fly to Perth. | 从那里，他将飞往珀斯。

lines.english: My brother has never been abroad before,
lines.chinese: 我哥哥以前从未出过国，
lines.raw: My brother has never been abroad before, | 我哥哥以前从未出过国，

lines.english: so he is finding this trip very exciting.
lines.chinese: 所以他觉得这次旅行非常令人兴奋。
lines.raw: so he is finding this trip very exciting. | 所以他觉得这次旅行非常令人兴奋。
